summary_draft: Canada-linked centralized exchange launched in 2015 that was later marked inactive and, by early 2025, publicly described as closed with user-inquiry responses ending on 2025-04-01.

non_archive.title: Mercatox review with 2025 closure update
non_archive.purpose: explicit closure update and 2025-04-01 terminal support date

non_archive.title: Mercatox review (Japanese mirror) with same 2025 closure update
non_archive.purpose: same closure text on alternate language page

evidence_notes: Current closure evidence is strong enough for a conservative dead-side stub.
Still add at least one archived official capture around the final closure state before public_ready promotion.
Need archive plus at least two non-archive sources before public_ready promotion.

event_candidates.title: Mercatox launch window
event_candidates.description: Later exchange reviews describe Mercatox as active since 2015 and specifically launched in October 2015.

event_candidates.title: Closure update posted
event_candidates.description: A public review update stated that Mercatox had closed operations and would stop responding to user inquiries on 2025-04-01.

event_candidates.title: User support ended
event_candidates.description: The published closure update stated that Mercatox would cease responding to user inquiries on 2025-04-01.

risks: current closure proof is still tracker-driven rather than a direct preserved official notice
country/origin may need refinement if stronger corporate records appear
final_notes: Use voluntary_shutdown conservatively unless stronger contrary evidence appears.
Next step: locate preserved official closure image or archived official notice from early 2025.
